metadata.description: glance — a terminal Markdown reader/editor and agent-native memory layer over a vault, as a Claude Code plugin: token-cheap retrieval plus an in-session renderer.

plugins.name: glance
plugins.description: Let Claude retrieve token-cheap context from a markdown vault (/glance-context) and map it (outline/links/graph), and render markdown in-session — with the full read/write surface available via 'glance mcp'.
